title: Strengthen tester guardrail against background task misuse
description: The tester guardrail template (templates/agents/tester.md) already prohibits run_in_background but agents keep violating it. The failure mode: agent runs tests in background, receives a task-notification, then claims structured output was already submitted and ends without emitting JSON. Fix: (1) move the run_in_background prohibition to the very top of the template before any other content; (2) add explicit instruction: if a task-notification appears in context, the constraint was violated — re-run the test synchronously and emit JSON as the final response; (3) add a final-action reminder that the JSON verdict block must be the absolute last output of the response.
acceptance_criteria: run_in_background prohibition appears at the very top of the template before Allowed/Disallowed sections
Template includes explicit instruction: if a task-notification appears in context, re-run the test synchronously
Template ends with a reminder that the JSON verdict block must be the final output — never end with prose or after a notification
No other behavioral content is changed
